results.domain: China Simples | Simplificando Importações da China
results.snippet: Oferecemos soluções completas de importação direta da China, com suporte total — do planejamento ao produto na sua porta. Nosso time cuida de tudo para você ...
results.summary:
Com a China Simples, você reduz custos em até 60%, acessa fornecedores exclusivos e ainda conta com uma equipe que cuida de absolutamente tudo da criação da sua marca ao desembarque do seu produto com isenção fiscal.
...
Importações legais com incentivo fiscal pelos portos de Santa Catarina (Itajaí, Navegantes, São Francisco, Itapoá), com abertura de filial, endereço fiscal e toda estrutura incluída no plano.
...
✅ Economize até 60% nos produtos e pague quase nada de imposto.
Nós cuidamos de tudo pra você.
Serviço ponta‑a‑ponta: cuidamos de toda a cadeia — identificação de fornecedores, controle de qualidade, negociação, documentação, logística e desembaraço aduaneiro — liberando o importador dessas etapas
Acesso democratizado: o investimento mínimo foi reduzido, chegando a R$ 3.000–4.500 em algumas categorias, permitindo que pequenos negócios também importem
Suporte local: equipes na China e no Brasil ajudam na comunicação, prazos e resolução ágil de problemas.

results.title: Top Quality Strategic Brazil Sourcing Services
results.snippet: Specialized procurement Brazil service providers can help you find and select suppliers in Brazil and procure products from the country at lower costs.
results.summary:
Companies looking to diversify LCC sourcing are strongly considering Latin America, and Brazil more specifically.
Over the years, Brazil sourcing has become more popular and the country has expanded its position as a competitive sourcing destination the rising interest can be attributed to a number of key country dimensions including a long period of political stability and economic growth, lower labor costs when compared to US or EU, economies of scale generated by the size of its large domestic market, shorter lead times and transportation costs to the US which are much cheaper when compared to Asian countries.
...
The main drivers for a company to source from Latin America are the localization of spend here to support the operations in the region, cost reduction, and alternative sources to rising costs in other low-cost sourcing countries.
In such circumstances, specialized procurement Brazil service providers can help you find and select suppliers in Brazil and procure products from the country at lower costs.
As a strategic sourcing or import company, they can help find the best partner in Brazil to manufacture the product of your choice and conduct inspections for quality assurance before it is delivered to you.
They understand that succeeding with sourcing from Brazil requires overcoming significant internal barriers to change.
...
Surprisingly, the major driver to sourcing from Brazil is not the search for cost reduction but the need to localize the spending in Latin America to support manufacturing facilities that have been set up in Latin America for the domestic markets.
The protective nature of the Latin American economies which still impose significant duties on most imports from outside the region thereby forcing the companies to find local sources of supply to remain competitive in their domestic markets is an important factor as well.
...
Hiring a third-party sourcing company will help you find out more about industry-specific market trends.
They can help you develop contacts at factories and establishments in Brazil.
They will also provide your company with the best options by engaging your enterprise in the initiative.
Their program will include from the very beginning, key internal customers, and members of your engineering, manufacturing, quality, or marketing teams.
- They deploy dedicated buyers – They are focused exclusively on sourcing for the export market
- They implement structured, objective, and disciplined procurement processes – Buying processes that suit Latin American countries perfectly
Procurement is an integral part of any global business’s ability to operate for profit with low-cost investment.
Services that will help you find, evaluate, and engage suppliers of goods and services are vital to operate in an increasingly competitive environment.
That is precisely the focus of Brazil sourcing companies.
The flexible and tailored solutions will help add value to your current strategy or develop a new one according to your requirements.
Reduce manufacturing costs, improve your quality over other suppliers, and stay ahead of the competition with the choice of procurement sourcing.

results.title: Quanto você precisa para começar a importar em 2024? - China Link
results.domain: China Link – Soluções de Importação e Feiras na Ásia
results.snippet: É muito importante lembrar que o valor final da sua importação vai variar de acordo com diversos fatores. Produto, fornecedor, quantidade, investimento, target ...
results.summary:
**Pesquise fornecedores e produtos:** Um dos passos mais importantes é encontrar fornecedores confiáveis.
Plataformas como Alibaba, Made in China, Global Sources podem te ajudar nesse processo, mas é muito importante se atentar à confiabilidade do fornecedor e entender como funciona a negociação na China, já que é uma cultura diferente.
Na parte de produtos, ferramentas como Google Trends e SimilarWeb podem te ajudar a encontrar produtos com alta demanda e baixa concorrência.
…
Porém, existe a **modalidade compartilhada:** onde você divide os custos fixos e o espaço do container com outros importadores, assim você consegue reduzir custos e começar com uma menor quantidade.
Importar da China exige **conhecimento ** e **experiência**.
Então, estar ao lado de quem é especialista no assunto é essencial.
A China Link é a **líder ** em soluções de importação no mercado brasileiro e te acompanha em todo o processo de importação, de forma segura e simplificada.
**O seu único trabalho vai ser pensar na estratégia de venda, para quando a sua mercadoria chegar.**

results.title: Sourcing From Brazil - Sourcing from Brazil
results.snippet: We provide a robust solution to this problem: sourcing from Brazil. With our expertise and extensive network, we ensure a diverse and reliable supply chain.
results.summary:
Between 2020 and 2024, many supply chain deficiencies were exposed, primarily due to over-reliance on a single supplier from a single country.
**Our Solution: Sourcing from Brazil**
We provide a robust solution to this problem: sourcing from Brazil.
With our expertise and extensive network, we ensure a diverse and reliable supply chain that can withstand global disruptions.
…
#### Our Mission
Our mission is to provide stability and flexibility in your sourcing process by helping you identify new suppliers across diverse geographical areas.
We aim to enhance your supply chain resilience and efficiency.
In addition to sourcing, we offer a premium white glove service through our comprehensive logistics solutions, ensuring a seamless and exceptional experience from start to finish.
…
## Superior Quality Standards
...
### Our Sourcing Services Include
- **Manufacturer Matching**: We find manufacturers that meet your specifications and quality standards.
- **Export Licensing**: For manufacturers without an export license, we offer in-house capabilities to accommodate your needs.
- **Quality Assurance**: We primarily work with ISO-certified manufacturers and those with reputable Brazilian certifications.
- **Comprehensive Vetting**: Our affiliates in Brazil identify potential manufacturers, visit their plants, screen facilities, validate them, and negotiate pricing before introducing them to you.
- **Regular Updates**: We provide regular updates on our progress throughout the sourcing process.
- **Cultural Expertise**: We offer a unique service of negotiating pricing while navigating cultural differences, ensuring smooth transactions.
- **Logistics**: In addition to sourcing, we provide door-to-door logistics services for your orders.

results.title: Empreender com a importação - IBSolutions
results.snippet: Está pensando em empreender com a importação e não sabe como começar? Pois então fique nesse post para entender melhor esse mercado.
results.summary:
O atacado e varejo também tem a disposição a importação de produtos importados.
Muitas dessas operações são feitas por grandes redes, utilizando Tradings Companies que eventualmente contam com benefícios fiscais do ICMS.
Outra modalidade bem utilizada é a importação por meio de distribuidor e representante comercial no Brasil.
São empresas que representam empresas estrangeiras e que funcionam como facilitadores comerciais.

results.title: Sinobra
results.snippet: Sinobra Group, established in 1992, Sao Paulo, serves as both an agent and facilitator of international commerce between its Chinese and Brazilian partners/ ...
results.summary:
Group Introduction
With over 20 years of continued operational experience, Sinobra Group, established in 1992, Sao Paulo, serves as both an agent and facilitator of international commerce between its Chinese and Brazilian partners/clients.
Strategically located office locations, within both the PRC and Brazil, enable Sinobra’s trilingual personnel to efficiently execute the various operational requirements of our clients.
Sinobra’s import/export solutions can be tailored to the individual requirements of its clients.
This includes, but is not limited to, direct product handling, raw material sourcing, and import/export of tooling/equipment as well as industrial machinery.
Group Identity
Mission:
To enhance the competitiveness of Brazilian companies, on the world stage, through the supply of first-rate products, raw materials, tools and equipment.
Vision:
To become the largest facilitator/representative of export driven businesses and to consolidate all federative Brazilian units.
To open the markets in which it operates while establishing a reputation of excellence for the services it provides.
To become the largest Brazilian export facilitator company.
Key Values:
Synergy, ethics, competence, transparency, team-work.
